title: Acrolein + PFA perfusion for immunocytochemistry
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"dmjfs","text":"Appropriate tissue fixation is essential for a good quality immunocytochemistry (ICC).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"ep1k7","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1uqne","text":"There are several fixation methods, but \"whole body\" or \"target\" perfusion of the animal is one of the most efficient methods.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"cco62","text":"Most perfusing protocols include only paraformaldehyde, but acrolein penetrates tissue more rapidly, improving final fixation of the tissue.  ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4kri2","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"2f2pk","text":"Acrolein is very toxic, similar to tear gas, so wear mask and don't get too close!","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Prepare animal as for Paraformaldehyde fixation; e.g. animal anesthetized with Nembutal, open chest cavity; inject 0.1 cc heparin into the heart apex before first rinse. We clamp the descending aorta to eliminate whole body perfusion. Cut atrium.
Saline nitrite rinse until clear effluent; about 150-200 ml/225-250 g rat. undetermined, 0.9% saline undetermined, Sodium Nitrite

Switch to Acrolein/Paraformaldehyde; continue until animal is hard, as judged by the front feet. Requires approximately 150-200 ml/225-250 g rat. undetermined, 8% PFA undetermined, 0.5 M Monobasic Potassium Phosphate undetermined, 0.5M Dibasic Potassium Phosphate undetermined, destilled water undetermined, acrolein add acrolein just before ready to perfuse; if using a sealed bottle or flask, slowly release pressure after doing so and before perfusing
Second saline nitrite rinse; ≈150 ml. No post-fixation necessary.
creator: Cleyde V Helena
